title: be going to (do)

Even the calendar is cute. [laughter] I knew you're going to say that >> this is cute. You will never find this in the dollar store in US. You know, actually when we went to um USA in Texas, there was um pretty big Daiso there.

examples: Don't even lie. It was the lamest, funniest [music] thing ever. [laughter] Today, I'm taking you guys with me to one of my favorite stores in Korea, Daiso. title: will be doing / will have done
examples: Don't even lie. It was the lamest, funniest [music] thing ever. [laughter] Today, I'm taking you guys with me to one of my favorite stores in Korea, Daiso.
